messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: 26+ done tickets' Telegram topics can't be cleaned up — no verified completion record
What it solves: The refusal itself (topicDeletion.ts) is CORRECT as a safety guard and
should be left intact — this ticket is about the upstream gap: closed/done
tickets from the BL-305..334 era have topic records that were never
written with a verified-completion message, so every concierge tick
re-logs 26+ refus…
How it works: The write path for verified completion records is identified and fixed for future closes
